description: On this page, you can update your profile information, such as your first name, last name, and profile photo. These details will be visible when making reservations. Make sure your information is up to date so others can easily recognize you!
descriptionWithCompany: On this page, you can update your profile information, such as your first name, last name, and profile photo. These details will be visible at work and when making reservations. Make sure your information is current so others can easily recognize you!
imageInformation: To add a profile photo, first delete the previous one if it’s already set.</br>Then click the button: Add profile photo.</br></br>Allowed formats: jpeg, png, webp.</br>Maximum file size: 2MB.
title: User profile
